title: edhoc.py: peer_pubkey parameter in process_message_2 is unused
description:
src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py:273 process_message_2(self, msg2: bytes, peer_pubkey: bytes) accepts peer_pubkey but never uses it.

Comment says signature verification is 'simplified' but this is misleading - callers think they're providing the peer's key for verification but it's silently ignored.
